query:
You are working on the wordpress-mobile/WordPress-Android repository.
The codebase is at version 23.92 (commit: 70eb2d9f).

## Issue to Resolve

[Jetpack Social] Fix share limits being shown for Atomic sites
Share limits shouldn't be shown for Atomic sites in the context of Jetpack Social. There are 3 place to double-check using an Atomic site:

1 - Share limits dashboard card;
2 - Edit post - publish bottom sheet;
3 - Edit post - settings;

See p9F6qB-dLk-p2#comment-56603

## Additional Context from Issue Discussion

@RenanLukas Is there a timeline for when this might be fixed that we can share with the user? The ticket is still open and it would be nice if we could give them an update.
@bobmatyas we're going to have a look this week.

## Relevant Files

The following files are likely relevant to solving this issue:
- `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/usecase/social/GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase.kt`

## Instructions

Please analyze this issue and implement a fix. Make the necessary code changes to resolve the problem described above.

Focus on:
- Understanding the root cause of the issue
- Making minimal, targeted changes to fix the problem
- Ensuring your changes don't break existing functionality

## Important Evaluation Notes

**Your work will be evaluated by running hidden tests that you do not have access to.** These tests will verify that your fix correctly addresses the issue. You should be confident in your solution before finishing.
**If you write tests to verify your changes, create them in NEW test files only** - do NOT modify existing test files

## CRITICAL RESTRICTIONS

**NEVER use git commands.** Do not run `git status`, `git diff`, `git checkout`, `git reset`, or ANY other git commands. Using git will corrupt the evaluation environment and invalidate your entire submission. All file operations should be done through normal file editing and reading tools, not git.

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.usecase.social
 2‚Üí
 3‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore
 5‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.FetchedJetpackSocialResult
 6‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.extensions.doesNotContain
 7‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
 8‚Üí
 9‚Üíclass GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase @Inject constructor(
10‚Üí    private val siteStore: SiteStore,
11‚Üí) {
12‚Üí    suspend fun execute(siteModel: SiteModel): ShareLimit {
13‚Üí        val isShareLimitEnabled =
14‚Üí            !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom
15‚Üí                    && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)
16‚Üí        val result = siteStore.fetchJetpackSocial(siteModel)
17‚Üí        return if (isShareLimitEnabled && result is FetchedJetpackSocialResult.Success) {
18‚Üí            with(result.jetpackSocial) {
19‚Üí                ShareLimit.Enabled(
20‚Üí                    shareLimit = shareLimit,
21‚Üí                    publicizedCount = publicizedCount,
22‚Üí                    sharedPostsCount = sharedPostsCount,
23‚Üí                    sharesRemaining = sharesRemaining,
24‚Üí                )
25‚Üí            }
26‚Üí        } else {
27‚Üí            ShareLimit.Disabled
28‚Üí        }
29‚Üí    }
30‚Üí}
31‚Üí
32‚Üísealed interface ShareLimit {
33‚Üí    data class Enabled(
34‚Üí        val shareLimit: Int,
35‚Üí        val publicizedCount: Int,
36‚Üí        val sharedPostsCount: Int,
37‚Üí        val sharesRemaining: Int,
38‚Üí    ) : ShareLimit
39‚Üí
40‚Üí    object Disabled : ShareLimit
41‚Üí}
42‚Üí
43‚Üíprivate const val FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000 = "social-shares-1000"
44‚Üí

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.util.extensions
 2‚Üí
 3‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 4‚Üí
 5‚Üíval SiteModel.logInformation: String
 6‚Üí    get() {
 7‚Üí        val typeLog = "Type: ($stateLogInformation)"
 8‚Üí        val usernameLog = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "" else username
 9‚Üí        val urlLog = "${if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "REST" else "Self-hosted"} URL: $url"
10‚Üí        val planLog = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "Plan: $planShortName ($planId)" else ""
11‚Üí        val jetpackVersionLog = if (isJetpackInstalled) "Jetpack-version: $jetpackVersion" else ""
12‚Üí        return listOf(typeLog, usernameLog, urlLog, planLog, jetpackVersionLog)
13‚Üí            .filter { it != "" }
14‚Üí            .joinToString(separator = " ", prefix = "<", postfix = ">")
15‚Üí    }
16‚Üí
17‚Üíval SiteModel.stateLogInformation: String
18‚Üí    get() {
19‚Üí        val apiString = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "REST" else "XML-RPC"
20‚Üí        return when {
21‚Üí            isWPCom -> "wpcom"
22‚Üí            isJetpackConnected -> "jetpack_connected - $apiString"
23‚Üí            isJetpackInstalled -> "self-hosted - jetpack_installed"
24‚Üí            else -> "self_hosted"
25‚Üí        }
26‚Üí    }
27‚Üí

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.plans
  2‚Üí
  3‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  6‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  7‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch
  8‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
  9‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 10‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.DashboardPlansCard
 12‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected
 13‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 14‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.BuildConfigWrapper
 15‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 16‚Üíimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 17‚Üíimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference
 18‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
 19‚Üíimport javax.inject.Named
 20‚Üí
 21‚Üíclass PlansCardUtils @Inject constructor(
 22‚Üí    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 23‚Üí    private val buildConfigWrapper: BuildConfigWrapper,
 24‚Üí    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25‚Üí    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 26‚Üí) {
 27‚Üí    private var dashboardUpdateDebounceJob: Job? = null
 28‚Üí
 29‚Üí    private val plansCardVisible = AtomicReference<Boolean?>(null)
 30‚Üí    private val waitingToTrack = AtomicBoolean(false)
 31‚Üí    private val currentSite = AtomicReference<Int?>(null)
 32‚Üí
 33‚Üí    fun shouldShowCard(
 34‚Üí        siteModel: SiteModel,
 35‚Üí    ): Boolean {
 36‚Üí        return buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp &&
 37‚Üí                !isCardHiddenByUser(siteModel.siteId) &&
 38‚Üí                (siteModel.isWPCom || siteModel.isWPComAtomic) &&
 39‚Üí                siteModel.hasFreePlan &&
 40‚Üí                siteModel.isAdmin &&
 41‚Üí                !siteModel.isWpForTeamsSite
 42‚Üí    }
 43‚Üí
 44‚Üí    fun hideCard(siteId: Long) {
 45‚Üí        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId, true)
 46‚Üí    }
 47‚Üí
 48‚Üí    fun trackCardShown(scope: CoroutineScope, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 49‚Üí        // cancel any existing job (debouncing mechanism)
 50‚Üí        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob?.cancel()
 51‚Üí
 52‚Üí        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 53‚Üí            val isVisible = siteSelected
 54‚Üí                ?.dashboardData
 55‚Üí                ?.any { card ->
 56‚Üí                    card is DashboardPlansCard
 57‚Üí                } ?: false
 58‚Üí
 59‚Üí            // add a delay (debouncing mechanism)
 60‚Üí            delay(CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE)
 61‚Üí
 62‚Üí            plansCardVisible.set(isVisible)
 63‚Üí            if (isVisible && waitingToTrack.getAndSet(false)) {
 64‚Üí                trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
 65‚Üí            }
 66‚Üí        }.also {
 67‚Üí            it.invokeOnCompletion { cause ->
 68‚Üí                // only set the job to null if it wasn't cancelled since cancellation is part of debouncing
 69‚Üí                if (cause == null) dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = null
 70‚Üí            }
 71‚Üí        }
 72‚Üí    }
 73‚Üí
 74‚Üí    fun onResume(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 75‚Üí        onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 76‚Üí    }
 77‚Üí
 78‚Üí    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 79‚Üí        if (currentSite.getAndSet(siteId) != siteId) {
 80‚Üí            plansCardVisible.set(null)
 81‚Üí            onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 82‚Üí        }
 83‚Üí    }
 84‚Üí
 85‚Üí    fun trackCardTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 86‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 87‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_TAPPED,
 88‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 89‚Üí        )
 90‚Üí    }
 91‚Üí
 92‚Üí    fun trackCardMoreMenuTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 93‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 94‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_MORE_MENU_TAPPED,
 95‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 96‚Üí        )
 97‚Üí    }
 98‚Üí
 99‚Üí    fun trackCardHiddenByUser(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
100‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
101‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_HIDDEN,
102‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
103‚Üí        )
104‚Üí    }
105‚Üí
106‚Üí    private fun trackCardShown(positionIndex: Int) {
107‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
108‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_SHOWN,
109‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex)
110‚Üí        )
111‚Üí    }
112‚Üí
113‚Üí    private fun isCardHiddenByUser(siteId: Long): Boolean {
114‚Üí        return appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId)
115‚Üí    }
116‚Üí
117‚Üí    private fun positionIndex(siteSelected: SiteSelected?): Int {
118‚Üí        return siteSelected
119‚Üí            ?.dashboardData
120‚Üí            ?.indexOfFirst {
121‚Üí                it is DashboardPlansCard
122‚Üí            } ?: -1
123‚Üí    }
124‚Üí
125‚Üí    private fun onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
126‚Üí        plansCardVisible.get()?.let { isVisible ->
127‚Üí            if (isVisible) trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
128‚Üí            waitingToTrack.set(false)
129‚Üí        } ?: run {
130‚Üí            waitingToTrack.set(true)
131‚Üí        }
132‚Üí    }
133‚Üí
134‚Üí    companion object {
135‚Üí        const val POSITION_INDEX = "position_index"
136‚Üí        private const val CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE = 500L
137‚Üí    }
138‚Üí}
139‚Üí

23‚Üí    private val blazeCardBuilder: BlazeCardBuilder,
24‚Üí    private val plansCardBuilder: PlansCardBuilder,
25‚Üí    private val pagesCardBuilder: PagesCardBuilder,
26‚Üí    private val activityCardBuilder: ActivityCardBuilder,
27‚Üí    private val dynamicCardsBuilder: DynamicCardsBuilder,
28‚Üí) {
29‚Üí    fun build(
30‚Üí        dashboardCardsBuilderParams: DashboardCardsBuilderParams
31‚Üí    ) = mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem.Card>().apply {
32‚Üí        if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.showErrorCard) {
33‚Üí            add(createErrorCard(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.onErrorRetryClick))
34‚Üí        } else {
35‚Üí            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.TOP)
36‚Üí                ?.let { addAll(it) }
37‚Üí
38‚Üí            bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams)
39‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
40‚Üí
41‚Üí            bloggingPromptCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams)
42‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
43‚Üí
44‚Üí            if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams != null) {
45‚Üí                add(blazeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams))
46‚Üí            }
47‚Üí
48‚Üí            plansCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams)?.let {
49‚Üí                add(it)
50‚Üí            }
51‚Üí
52‚Üí            todaysStatsCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.todaysStatsCardBuilderParams)
53‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
54‚Üí
55‚Üí            addAll(postCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.postCardBuilderParams))
56‚Üí
57‚Üí            pagesCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.pagesCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
58‚Üí
59‚Üí            activityCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.activityCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
60‚Üí
61‚Üí            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.BOTTOM)
62‚Üí                ?.let { addAll(it) }
63‚Üí        }
64‚Üí    }.toList()
65‚Üí
66‚Üí    private fun createErrorCard(onErrorRetryClick: () -> Unit) = MySiteCardAndItem.Card.ErrorCard(
67‚Üí        onRetryClick = ListItemInteraction.create(onErrorRetryClick)
68‚Üí    )
69‚Üí}

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dynamiccard
 2‚Üí
 3‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.DynamicCardsModel.CardOrder
 4‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.DynamicCardsModel.DynamicCardModel
 5‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.deeplinks.handlers.DeepLinkHandlers
 6‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.Dynamic
 7‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.DynamicCardsBuilderParams
 8‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.ListItemInteraction
 9‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
10‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.FeatureFlagConfig
12‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
13‚Üí
14‚Üíclass DynamicCardsBuilder @Inject constructor(
15‚Üí    private val urlUtils: UrlUtilsWrapper,
16‚Üí    private val deepLinkHandlers: DeepLinkHandlers,
17‚Üí    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
18‚Üí    private val featureFlagConfig: FeatureFlagConfig,
19‚Üí) {
20‚Üí    fun build(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic>? {
21‚Üí        if (!dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() || !shouldBuildCard(params, order)) {
22‚Üí            return null
23‚Üí        }
24‚Üí        return convertToDynamicCards(params, order)
25‚Üí    }
26‚Üí
27‚Üí    private fun shouldBuildCard(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): Boolean {
28‚Üí        return !(params.dynamicCards == null || params.dynamicCards.dynamicCards.none { it.order == order })
29‚Üí    }
30‚Üí
31‚Üí    private fun convertToDynamicCards(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic> {
32‚Üí        val cards = params.dynamicCards?.dynamicCards?.filter { it.order == order && it.isEnabled() }.orEmpty()
33‚Üí        return cards.map { card ->
34‚Üí            Dynamic(
35‚Üí                id = card.id,
36‚Üí                rows = card.rows.map { row ->
37‚Üí                    Dynamic.Row(
38‚Üí                        iconUrl = row.icon,
39‚Üí                        title = row.title,
40‚Üí                        description = row.description,
41‚Üí                    )
42‚Üí                },
43‚Üí                title = card.title,
44‚Üí                image = card.featuredImage,
45‚Üí                action = getActionSource(params, card),
46‚Üí                onHideMenuItemClick = ListItemInteraction.create(card.id, params.onHideMenuItemClick),
47‚Üí            )
48‚Üí        }
49‚Üí    }
50‚Üí
51‚Üí    fun DynamicCardModel.isEnabled(): Boolean {
52‚Üí        // If there is no feature flag or there is no such remote feature flag, then the card is enabled
53‚Üí        if (remoteFeatureFlag.isNullOrEmpty() ||
54‚Üí            featureFlagConfig.getString(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag)).isEmpty()
55‚Üí        ) return true
56‚Üí        return featureFlagConfig.isEnabled(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag))
57‚Üí    }
58‚Üí
59‚Üí    private fun getActionSource(
60‚Üí        params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams,
61‚Üí        card: DynamicCardModel
62‚Üí    ): Dynamic.ActionSource? = when {
63‚Üí        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) && isValidActionTitle(card.action) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.CardOrButton(
64‚Üí            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
65‚Üí            title = requireNotNull(card.action),
66‚Üí            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
67‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
68‚Üí                action = params.onCardClick
69‚Üí            ),
70‚Üí            onButtonClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
71‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
72‚Üí                action = params.onCtaClick
73‚Üí            )
74‚Üí        )
75‚Üí        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.Card(
76‚Üí            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
77‚Üí            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
78‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
79‚Üí                action = params.onCardClick
80‚Üí            )
81‚Üí        )
82‚Üí        else -> null
83‚Üí    }
84‚Üí
85‚Üí    private fun isValidUrlOrDeeplink(url: String?): Boolean {
86‚Üí        return !url.isNullOrEmpty() && (urlUtils.isValidUrlAndHostNotNull(url)
87‚Üí                || deepLinkHandlers.isDeepLink(url))
88‚Üí    }
89‚Üí
90‚Üí    private fun isValidActionTitle(title: String?): Boolean {
91‚Üí        return !title.isNullOrEmpty()
92‚Üí    }
93‚Üí}
94‚Üí

18‚Üíclass EditPostPublishSettingsJetpackSocialUiStateMapper @Inject constructor(
19‚Üí    private val stringProvider: StringProvider,
20‚Üí    private val localeProvider: LocaleProvider,
21‚Üí    private val publicizeTableWrapper: PublicizeTableWrapper,
22‚Üí) {
23‚Üí    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
24‚Üí    fun mapLoaded(
25‚Üí        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>,
26‚Üí        shareLimit: ShareLimit,
27‚Üí        socialSharingModel: PostSocialSharingModel,
28‚Üí        onSubscribeClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
29‚Üí        shareMessage: String,
30‚Üí        onShareMessageClick: () -> Unit,
31‚Üí        onConnectionClick: (PostSocialConnection, Boolean, JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
32‚Üí        isPostPublished: Boolean,
33‚Üí    ): Loaded {
34‚Üí        val selectedConnectionsSize = connections.filter { it.isSharingEnabled }.size
35‚Üí        return Loaded(
36‚Üí            jetpackSocialConnectionDataList = connections.map { connection ->
37‚Üí                JetpackSocialConnectionData(
38‚Üí                    postSocialConnection = connection,
39‚Üí                    onConnectionClick = { newValue, flow -> onConnectionClick(connection, newValue, flow) },
40‚Üí                    enabled = !isPostPublished && if (shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled) {
41‚Üí                        if (!connection.isSharingEnabled) {
42‚Üí                            shareLimit.sharesRemaining > selectedConnectionsSize
43‚Üí                        } else shareLimit.sharesRemaining > 0
44‚Üí                    } else true
45‚Üí                )
46‚Üí            },
47‚Üí            socialSharingModel = socialSharingModel,
48‚Üí            showShareLimitUi = !isPostPublished && shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled,
49‚Üí            isShareMessageEnabled = !isPostPublished,
50‚Üí            shareMessage = shareMessage,
51‚Üí            onShareMessageClick = onShareMessageClick,
52‚Üí            subscribeButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_subscribe_share_more)
53‚Üí                .uppercase(localeProvider.getAppLocale()),
54‚Üí            onSubscribeClick = onSubscribeClick,
55‚Üí        )
56‚Üí    }
57‚Üí
58‚Üí    fun mapNoConnections(
59‚Üí        onConnectProfilesClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
60‚Üí        onNotNowClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
61‚Üí    ): NoConnections =
62‚Üí        NoConnections(
63‚Üí            trainOfIconsModels = publicizeTableWrapper.getServiceList()
64‚Üí                .filter { it.status != PublicizeService.Status.UNSUPPORTED }
65‚Üí                .mapNotNull { PublicizeServiceIcon.fromServiceId(it.id) }
66‚Üí                .map { TrainOfIconsModel(it.iconResId) },
67‚Üí            message = stringProvider.getString(
68‚Üí                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_message
69‚Üí            ),
70‚Üí            connectProfilesButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
71‚Üí                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_social_profiles_button
72‚Üí            ),
73‚Üí            onConnectProfilesClick = onConnectProfilesClick,
74‚Üí            notNowButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(
75‚Üí                R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_connect_not_now_button
76‚Üí            ),
77‚Üí            onNotNowClick = onNotNowClick,
78‚Üí        )
79‚Üí}

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard
  2‚Üí
  3‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  4‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
  5‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  8‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  9‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
 10‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 12‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.Type
 13‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.dashboard.CardsStore
 14‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 15‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteSource.MySiteRefreshSource
 16‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteUiState.PartialState.CardsUpdate
 17‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SelectedSiteRepository
 18‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.activity.DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils
 19‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 20‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
 21‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
 22‚Üíimport javax.inject.Named
 23‚Üí
 24‚Üíconst val REFRESH_DELAY = 500L
 25‚Üí
 26‚Üíclass CardsSource @Inject constructor(
 27‚Üí    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
 28‚Üí    private val cardsStore: CardsStore,
 29‚Üí    private val dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils: DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils,
 30‚Üí    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 31‚Üí    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 32‚Üí    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
 33‚Üí) : MySiteRefreshSource<CardsUpdate> {
 34‚Üí    override val refresh = MutableLiveData(false)
 35‚Üí
 36‚Üí    override fun build(coroutineScope: CoroutineScope, siteLocalId: Int): LiveData<CardsUpdate> {
 37‚Üí        val result = MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>()
 38‚Üí        result.getData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 39‚Üí        result.addSource(refresh) { result.refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId, refresh.value) }
 40‚Üí        refresh()
 41‚Üí        return result
 42‚Üí    }
 43‚Üí
 44‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.getData(
 45‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 46‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int
 47‚Üí    ) {
 48‚Üí        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 49‚Üí        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 50‚Üí            coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 51‚Üí                cardsStore.getCards(selectedSite)
 52‚Üí                    .map { it.model }
 53‚Üí                    .map { cards -> cards?.filter { getCardTypes(selectedSite).contains(it.type) } }
 54‚Üí                    .collect { result ->
 55‚Üí                        postValue(CardsUpdate(result))
 56‚Üí                    }
 57‚Üí            }
 58‚Üí        } else {
 59‚Üí            postErrorState()
 60‚Üí        }
 61‚Üí    }
 62‚Üí
 63‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 64‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 65‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int,
 66‚Üí        isRefresh: Boolean? = null
 67‚Üí    ) {
 68‚Üí        when (isRefresh) {
 69‚Üí            null, true -> refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 70‚Üí            else -> Unit // Do nothing
 71‚Üí        }
 72‚Üí    }
 73‚Üí
 74‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 75‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 76‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int
 77‚Üí    ) {
 78‚Üí        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 79‚Üí        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 80‚Üí            fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(coroutineScope, selectedSite)
 81‚Üí        } else {
 82‚Üí            postErrorState()
 83‚Üí        }
 84‚Üí    }
 85‚Üí
 86‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(
 87‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 88‚Üí        selectedSite: SiteModel
 89‚Üí    ) {
 90‚Üí        coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 91‚Üí            delay(REFRESH_DELAY)
 92‚Üí            val result = cardsStore.fetchCards(selectedSite, getCardTypes(selectedSite))
 93‚Üí            val model = result.model
 94‚Üí            val error = result.error
 95‚Üí            when {
 96‚Üí                error != null -> postErrorState()
 97‚Üí                model != null -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 98‚Üí                else -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 99‚Üí            }
100‚Üí        }
101‚Üí    }
102‚Üí
103‚Üí    private fun getCardTypes(selectedSite: SiteModel) = mutableListOf<Type>().apply {
104‚Üí        if (shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.TODAYS_STATS)
105‚Üí        if (shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.PAGES)
106‚Üí        if (dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils.shouldRequestActivityCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.ACTIVITY)
107‚Üí        add(Type.POSTS)
108‚Üí        if (shouldRequestDynamicCards()) add(Type.DYNAMIC)
109‚Üí    }.toList()
110‚Üí
111‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
112‚Üí        return (selectedSite.hasCapabilityEditPages || selectedSite.isSelfHostedAdmin) &&
113‚Üí                !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePagesDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
114‚Üí    }
115‚Üí
116‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
117‚Üí        return !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
118‚Üí    }
119‚Üí
120‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestDynamicCards(): Boolean {
121‚Üí        return dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
122‚Üí    }
123‚Üí
124‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.postErrorState() {
125‚Üí        val lastStateCards = this.value?.cards
126‚Üí        val showErrorCard = lastStateCards.isNullOrEmpty()
127‚Üí        val showError = lastStateCards?.isNotEmpty() == true
128‚Üí        postState(
129‚Üí            CardsUpdate(
130‚Üí                cards = lastStateCards,
131‚Üí                showErrorCard = showErrorCard,
132‚Üí                showSnackbarError = showError,
133‚Üí                showStaleMessage = showError
134‚Üí            )
135‚Üí        )
136‚Üí    }
137‚Üí}
138‚Üí

 42‚Üí
 43‚Üí    class PrepublishingHomeListItemViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 44‚Üí        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_action_list_item) {

 48‚Üí
 49‚Üí        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 50‚Üí            uiState as HomeUiState
 51‚Üí
 52‚Üí            actionType.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.navigationAction.textRes)
 53‚Üí            uiState.actionResult?.let { resultText ->
 54‚Üí                actionResult.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, resultText)
 55‚Üí            }
 56‚Üí
 57‚Üí            actionLayout.isEnabled = uiState.actionClickable

 65‚Üí                    uiState.actionTypeColor
 66‚Üí                )
 67‚Üí            )

 70‚Üí                    itemView.context,
 71‚Üí                    uiState.actionResultColor
 72‚Üí                )
 73‚Üí            )
 74‚Üí        }
 75‚Üí    }

102‚Üí            uiState as ButtonUiState
103‚Üí
104‚Üí            button.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.buttonText)
105‚Üí            button.setOnClickListener {

116‚Üí        private val dividerView: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.bottom_divider)
117‚Üí

156‚Üí                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
157‚Üí                                )

conversation_history.content: WordPress/src/test/java/org/wordpress/android/usecase/social/GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCaseAtomicTest.kt deleted successfully.

content.text:
The issue was that Jetpack Social share limits were being shown for Atomic sites, which should not happen. Atomic sites are hosted on WordPress.com but often behave like self-hosted sites in certain checks within the app.

I have updated the core logic responsible for determining if the Jetpack Social share limit should be enabled. The logic is located in the `GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase` class. 

Specifically, I modified the `isShareLimitEnabled` check to explicitly exclude sites where `siteModel.isWPComAtomic` is true. This ensures that Atomic sites are treated similarly to simple WordPress.com sites in the context of Jetpack Social share limits, effectively disabling the share limit UI for them.

This change addresses all three areas mentioned in the issue:
1. Share limits dashboard card
2. Edit post - publish bottom sheet
3. Edit post - settings

since all these components rely on `GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase` to determine the share limit status.

### Changes:
- Modified `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/usecase/social/GetJetpackSocialShareLimitStatusUseCase.kt`:
    - Updated `isShareLimitEnabled` to include a check for `!siteModel.isWPComAtomic`.

```kotlin
        val isShareLimitEnabled =
            !siteModel.isHostedAtWPCom && !siteModel.isWPComAtomic
                    && (siteModel.planActiveFeatures?.split(",")?.doesNotContain(FEATURE_SOCIAL_SHARES_1000) != false)
```

22‚Üí                    sharedPostsCount = sharedPostsCount,

24‚Üí                )

 5‚Üíval SiteModel.logInformation: String
 6‚Üí    get() {
 7‚Üí        val typeLog = "Type: ($stateLogInformation)"
 8‚Üí        val usernameLog = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "" else username
 9‚Üí        val urlLog = "${if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "REST" else "Self-hosted"} URL: $url"
10‚Üí        val planLog = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "Plan: $planShortName ($planId)" else ""
11‚Üí        val jetpackVersionLog = if (isJetpackInstalled) "Jetpack-version: $jetpackVersion" else ""
12‚Üí        return listOf(typeLog, usernameLog, urlLog, planLog, jetpackVersionLog)
13‚Üí            .filter { it != "" }
14‚Üí            .joinToString(separator = " ", prefix = "<", postfix = ">")
15‚Üí    }
16‚Üí
17‚Üíval SiteModel.stateLogInformation: String
18‚Üí    get() {
19‚Üí        val apiString = if (isUsingWpComRestApi) "REST" else "XML-RPC"
20‚Üí        return when {
21‚Üí            isWPCom -> "wpcom"
22‚Üí            isJetpackConnected -> "jetpack_connected - $apiString"
23‚Üí            isJetpackInstalled -> "self-hosted - jetpack_installed"

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.plans
  2‚Üí
  3‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  4‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  5‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.Job
  6‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  7‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch
  8‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.analytics.AnalyticsTracker
  9‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 10‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem.Card.DashboardPlansCard
 12‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteViewModel.State.SiteSelected
 13‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 14‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.BuildConfigWrapper
 15‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.analytics.AnalyticsTrackerWrapper
 16‚Üíimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicBoolean
 17‚Üíimport java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicReference
 18‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
 19‚Üíimport javax.inject.Named
 20‚Üí
 21‚Üíclass PlansCardUtils @Inject constructor(
 22‚Üí    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 23‚Üí    private val buildConfigWrapper: BuildConfigWrapper,
 24‚Üí    private val analyticsTrackerWrapper: AnalyticsTrackerWrapper,
 25‚Üí    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 26‚Üí) {
 27‚Üí    private var dashboardUpdateDebounceJob: Job? = null
 28‚Üí
 29‚Üí    private val plansCardVisible = AtomicReference<Boolean?>(null)
 30‚Üí    private val waitingToTrack = AtomicBoolean(false)
 31‚Üí    private val currentSite = AtomicReference<Int?>(null)
 32‚Üí
 33‚Üí    fun shouldShowCard(
 34‚Üí        siteModel: SiteModel,
 35‚Üí    ): Boolean {
 36‚Üí        return buildConfigWrapper.isJetpackApp &&
 37‚Üí                !isCardHiddenByUser(siteModel.siteId) &&
 38‚Üí                (siteModel.isWPCom || siteModel.isWPComAtomic) &&
 39‚Üí                siteModel.hasFreePlan &&
 40‚Üí                siteModel.isAdmin &&
 41‚Üí                !siteModel.isWpForTeamsSite
 42‚Üí    }
 43‚Üí
 44‚Üí    fun hideCard(siteId: Long) {
 45‚Üí        appPrefsWrapper.setShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId, true)
 46‚Üí    }
 47‚Üí
 48‚Üí    fun trackCardShown(scope: CoroutineScope, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 49‚Üí        // cancel any existing job (debouncing mechanism)
 50‚Üí        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob?.cancel()
 51‚Üí
 52‚Üí        dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = scope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 53‚Üí            val isVisible = siteSelected
 54‚Üí                ?.dashboardData
 55‚Üí                ?.any { card ->
 56‚Üí                    card is DashboardPlansCard
 57‚Üí                } ?: false
 58‚Üí
 59‚Üí            // add a delay (debouncing mechanism)
 60‚Üí            delay(CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE)
 61‚Üí
 62‚Üí            plansCardVisible.set(isVisible)
 63‚Üí            if (isVisible && waitingToTrack.getAndSet(false)) {
 64‚Üí                trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
 65‚Üí            }
 66‚Üí        }.also {
 67‚Üí            it.invokeOnCompletion { cause ->
 68‚Üí                // only set the job to null if it wasn't cancelled since cancellation is part of debouncing
 69‚Üí                if (cause == null) dashboardUpdateDebounceJob = null
 70‚Üí            }
 71‚Üí        }
 72‚Üí    }
 73‚Üí
 74‚Üí    fun onResume(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 75‚Üí        onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 76‚Üí    }
 77‚Üí
 78‚Üí    fun onSiteChanged(siteId: Int?, siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 79‚Üí        if (currentSite.getAndSet(siteId) != siteId) {
 80‚Üí            plansCardVisible.set(null)
 81‚Üí            onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected)
 82‚Üí        }
 83‚Üí    }
 84‚Üí
 85‚Üí    fun trackCardTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 86‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 87‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_TAPPED,
 88‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 89‚Üí        )
 90‚Üí    }
 91‚Üí
 92‚Üí    fun trackCardMoreMenuTapped(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
 93‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
 94‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_MORE_MENU_TAPPED,
 95‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
 96‚Üí        )
 97‚Üí    }
 98‚Üí
 99‚Üí    fun trackCardHiddenByUser(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
100‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
101‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_HIDDEN,
102‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex(siteSelected))
103‚Üí        )
104‚Üí    }
105‚Üí
106‚Üí    private fun trackCardShown(positionIndex: Int) {
107‚Üí        analyticsTrackerWrapper.track(
108‚Üí            AnalyticsTracker.Stat.DASHBOARD_CARD_PLANS_SHOWN,
109‚Üí            mapOf(POSITION_INDEX to positionIndex)
110‚Üí        )
111‚Üí    }
112‚Üí
113‚Üí    private fun isCardHiddenByUser(siteId: Long): Boolean {
114‚Üí        return appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideDashboardPlansCard(siteId)
115‚Üí    }
116‚Üí
117‚Üí    private fun positionIndex(siteSelected: SiteSelected?): Int {
118‚Üí        return siteSelected
119‚Üí            ?.dashboardData
120‚Üí            ?.indexOfFirst {
121‚Üí                it is DashboardPlansCard
122‚Üí            } ?: -1
123‚Üí    }
124‚Üí
125‚Üí    private fun onDashboardRefreshed(siteSelected: SiteSelected?) {
126‚Üí        plansCardVisible.get()?.let { isVisible ->
127‚Üí            if (isVisible) trackCardShown(positionIndex(siteSelected))
128‚Üí            waitingToTrack.set(false)
129‚Üí        } ?: run {
130‚Üí            waitingToTrack.set(true)
131‚Üí        }
132‚Üí    }
133‚Üí
134‚Üí    companion object {
135‚Üí        const val POSITION_INDEX = "position_index"
136‚Üí        private const val CARD_VISIBLE_DEBOUNCE = 500L
137‚Üí    }
138‚Üí}

 4‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItem
 5‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteCardAndItemBuilderParams.DashboardCardsBuilderParams

 7‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.activity.ActivityCardBuilder
 8‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.bloganuary.BloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder
 9‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.bloggingprompts.BloggingPromptCardBuilder
10‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.pages.PagesCardBuilder
11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.posts.PostCardBuilder
12‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.todaysstats.TodaysStatsCardBuilder
13‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.plans.PlansCardBuilder
14‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dynamiccard.DynamicCardsBuilder

17‚Üí
18‚Üíclass CardsBuilder @Inject constructor(
19‚Üí    private val todaysStatsCardBuilder: TodaysStatsCardBuilder,
20‚Üí    private val postCardBuilder: PostCardBuilder,
21‚Üí    private val bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder: BloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder,
22‚Üí    private val bloggingPromptCardBuilder: BloggingPromptCardBuilder,
23‚Üí    private val blazeCardBuilder: BlazeCardBuilder,
24‚Üí    private val plansCardBuilder: PlansCardBuilder,
25‚Üí    private val pagesCardBuilder: PagesCardBuilder,
26‚Üí    private val activityCardBuilder: ActivityCardBuilder,
27‚Üí    private val dynamicCardsBuilder: DynamicCardsBuilder,
28‚Üí) {
29‚Üí    fun build(
30‚Üí        dashboardCardsBuilderParams: DashboardCardsBuilderParams
31‚Üí    ) = mutableListOf<MySiteCardAndItem.Card>().apply {
32‚Üí        if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.showErrorCard) {
33‚Üí            add(createErrorCard(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.onErrorRetryClick))
34‚Üí        } else {
35‚Üí            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.TOP)
36‚Üí                ?.let { addAll(it) }
37‚Üí
38‚Üí            bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloganuaryNudgeCardBuilderParams)
39‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
40‚Üí
41‚Üí            bloggingPromptCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.bloggingPromptCardBuilderParams)
42‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
43‚Üí
44‚Üí            if (dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams != null) {
45‚Üí                add(blazeCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.blazeCardBuilderParams))
46‚Üí            }
47‚Üí
48‚Üí            plansCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dashboardCardPlansBuilderParams)?.let {
49‚Üí                add(it)
50‚Üí            }
51‚Üí
52‚Üí            todaysStatsCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.todaysStatsCardBuilderParams)
53‚Üí                ?.let { add(it) }
54‚Üí
55‚Üí            addAll(postCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.postCardBuilderParams))
56‚Üí
57‚Üí            pagesCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.pagesCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
58‚Üí
59‚Üí            activityCardBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.activityCardBuilderParams)?.let { add(it) }
60‚Üí
61‚Üí            dynamicCardsBuilder.build(dashboardCardsBuilderParams.dynamicCardsBuilderParams, CardOrder.BOTTOM)
62‚Üí                ?.let { addAll(it) }
63‚Üí        }
64‚Üí    }.toList()
65‚Üí
66‚Üí    private fun createErrorCard(onErrorRetryClick: () -> Unit) = MySiteCardAndItem.Card.ErrorCard(
67‚Üí        onRetryClick = ListItemInteraction.create(onErrorRetryClick)
68‚Üí    )
69‚Üí}

1‚Üípackage org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dynamiccard
 2‚Üí
 3‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.DynamicCardsModel.CardOrder

 8‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.utils.ListItemInteraction
 9‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
10‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.FeatureFlagConfig
12‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
13‚Üí
14‚Üíclass DynamicCardsBuilder @Inject constructor(
15‚Üí    private val urlUtils: UrlUtilsWrapper,
16‚Üí    private val deepLinkHandlers: DeepLinkHandlers,
17‚Üí    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
18‚Üí    private val featureFlagConfig: FeatureFlagConfig,
19‚Üí) {
20‚Üí    fun build(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic>? {
21‚Üí        if (!dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled() || !shouldBuildCard(params, order)) {
22‚Üí            return null
23‚Üí        }
24‚Üí        return convertToDynamicCards(params, order)
25‚Üí    }
26‚Üí
27‚Üí    private fun shouldBuildCard(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): Boolean {
28‚Üí        return !(params.dynamicCards == null || params.dynamicCards.dynamicCards.none { it.order == order })
29‚Üí    }
30‚Üí
31‚Üí    private fun convertToDynamicCards(params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams, order: CardOrder): List<Dynamic> {
32‚Üí        val cards = params.dynamicCards?.dynamicCards?.filter { it.order == order && it.isEnabled() }.orEmpty()
33‚Üí        return cards.map { card ->
34‚Üí            Dynamic(
35‚Üí                id = card.id,
36‚Üí                rows = card.rows.map { row ->
37‚Üí                    Dynamic.Row(
38‚Üí                        iconUrl = row.icon,
39‚Üí                        title = row.title,
40‚Üí                        description = row.description,
41‚Üí                    )
42‚Üí                },
43‚Üí                title = card.title,
44‚Üí                image = card.featuredImage,
45‚Üí                action = getActionSource(params, card),
46‚Üí                onHideMenuItemClick = ListItemInteraction.create(card.id, params.onHideMenuItemClick),
47‚Üí            )
48‚Üí        }
49‚Üí    }
50‚Üí
51‚Üí    fun DynamicCardModel.isEnabled(): Boolean {
52‚Üí        // If there is no feature flag or there is no such remote feature flag, then the card is enabled
53‚Üí        if (remoteFeatureFlag.isNullOrEmpty() ||
54‚Üí            featureFlagConfig.getString(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag)).isEmpty()
55‚Üí        ) return true
56‚Üí        return featureFlagConfig.isEnabled(requireNotNull(remoteFeatureFlag))
57‚Üí    }
58‚Üí
59‚Üí    private fun getActionSource(
60‚Üí        params: DynamicCardsBuilderParams,
61‚Üí        card: DynamicCardModel
62‚Üí    ): Dynamic.ActionSource? = when {
63‚Üí        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) && isValidActionTitle(card.action) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.CardOrButton(
64‚Üí            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
65‚Üí            title = requireNotNull(card.action),
66‚Üí            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
67‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
68‚Üí                action = params.onCardClick
69‚Üí            ),
70‚Üí            onButtonClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
71‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
72‚Üí                action = params.onCtaClick
73‚Üí            )
74‚Üí        )
75‚Üí        isValidUrlOrDeeplink(card.url) -> Dynamic.ActionSource.Card(
76‚Üí            url = requireNotNull(card.url),
77‚Üí            onCardClick = ListItemInteraction.create(
78‚Üí                data = DynamicCardsBuilderParams.ClickParams(id = card.id, actionUrl = requireNotNull(card.url)),
79‚Üí                action = params.onCardClick
80‚Üí            )
81‚Üí        )
82‚Üí        else -> null
83‚Üí    }
84‚Üí
85‚Üí    private fun isValidUrlOrDeeplink(url: String?): Boolean {
86‚Üí        return !url.isNullOrEmpty() && (urlUtils.isValidUrlAndHostNotNull(url)
87‚Üí                || deepLinkHandlers.isDeepLink(url))
88‚Üí    }
89‚Üí
90‚Üí    private fun isValidActionTitle(title: String?): Boolean {
91‚Üí        return !title.isNullOrEmpty()
92‚Üí    }
93‚Üí}

23‚Üí    @Suppress("LongParameterList")
24‚Üí    fun mapLoaded(
25‚Üí        connections: List<PostSocialConnection>,
26‚Üí        shareLimit: ShareLimit,

41‚Üí                        if (!connection.isSharingEnabled) {
42‚Üí                            shareLimit.sharesRemaining > selectedConnectionsSize
43‚Üí                        } else shareLimit.sharesRemaining > 0
44‚Üí                    } else true
45‚Üí                )
46‚Üí            },
47‚Üí            socialSharingModel = socialSharingModel,
48‚Üí            showShareLimitUi = !isPostPublished && shareLimit is ShareLimit.Enabled,
49‚Üí            isShareMessageEnabled = !isPostPublished,

51‚Üí            onShareMessageClick = onShareMessageClick,
52‚Üí            subscribeButtonLabel = stringProvider.getString(R.string.post_settings_jetpack_social_subscribe_share_more)
53‚Üí                .uppercase(localeProvider.getAppLocale()),

60‚Üí        onNotNowClick: (JetpackSocialFlow) -> Unit,
61‚Üí    ): NoConnections =

65‚Üí                .mapNotNull { PublicizeServiceIcon.fromServiceId(it.id) }

69‚Üí            ),

  2‚Üí
  3‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.LiveData
  4‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.MediatorLiveData
  5‚Üíimport androidx.lifecycle.MutableLiveData
  6‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineDispatcher
  7‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
  8‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.delay
  9‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.flow.map
 10‚Üíimport kotlinx.coroutines.launch
 11‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.SiteModel
 12‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.model.dashboard.CardModel.Type
 13‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.dashboard.CardsStore
 14‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.modules.BG_THREAD
 15‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteSource.MySiteRefreshSource
 16‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.MySiteUiState.PartialState.CardsUpdate
 17‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.SelectedSiteRepository
 18‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.mysite.cards.dashboard.activity.DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils
 19‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.ui.prefs.AppPrefsWrapper
 20‚Üíimport org.wordpress.android.util.config.DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig
 21‚Üíimport javax.inject.Inject
 22‚Üíimport javax.inject.Named
 23‚Üí
 24‚Üíconst val REFRESH_DELAY = 500L
 25‚Üí
 26‚Üíclass CardsSource @Inject constructor(
 27‚Üí    private val selectedSiteRepository: SelectedSiteRepository,
 28‚Üí    private val cardsStore: CardsStore,
 29‚Üí    private val dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils: DashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils,
 30‚Üí    @param:Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher,
 31‚Üí    private val appPrefsWrapper: AppPrefsWrapper,
 32‚Üí    private val dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig: DynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig,
 33‚Üí) : MySiteRefreshSource<CardsUpdate> {
 34‚Üí    override val refresh = MutableLiveData(false)
 35‚Üí
 36‚Üí    override fun build(coroutineScope: CoroutineScope, siteLocalId: Int): LiveData<CardsUpdate> {
 37‚Üí        val result = MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>()
 38‚Üí        result.getData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 39‚Üí        result.addSource(refresh) { result.refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId, refresh.value) }
 40‚Üí        refresh()
 41‚Üí        return result
 42‚Üí    }
 43‚Üí
 44‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.getData(
 45‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 46‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int
 47‚Üí    ) {
 48‚Üí        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 49‚Üí        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 50‚Üí            coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 51‚Üí                cardsStore.getCards(selectedSite)
 52‚Üí                    .map { it.model }
 53‚Üí                    .map { cards -> cards?.filter { getCardTypes(selectedSite).contains(it.type) } }
 54‚Üí                    .collect { result ->
 55‚Üí                        postValue(CardsUpdate(result))
 56‚Üí                    }
 57‚Üí            }
 58‚Üí        } else {
 59‚Üí            postErrorState()
 60‚Üí        }
 61‚Üí    }
 62‚Üí
 63‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 64‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 65‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int,
 66‚Üí        isRefresh: Boolean? = null
 67‚Üí    ) {
 68‚Üí        when (isRefresh) {
 69‚Üí            null, true -> refreshData(coroutineScope, siteLocalId)
 70‚Üí            else -> Unit // Do nothing
 71‚Üí        }
 72‚Üí    }
 73‚Üí
 74‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.refreshData(
 75‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 76‚Üí        siteLocalId: Int
 77‚Üí    ) {
 78‚Üí        val selectedSite = selectedSiteRepository.getSelectedSite()
 79‚Üí        if (selectedSite != null && selectedSite.id == siteLocalId) {
 80‚Üí            fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(coroutineScope, selectedSite)
 81‚Üí        } else {
 82‚Üí            postErrorState()
 83‚Üí        }
 84‚Üí    }
 85‚Üí
 86‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.fetchCardsAndPostErrorIfAvailable(
 87‚Üí        coroutineScope: CoroutineScope,
 88‚Üí        selectedSite: SiteModel
 89‚Üí    ) {
 90‚Üí        coroutineScope.launch(bgDispatcher) {
 91‚Üí            delay(REFRESH_DELAY)
 92‚Üí            val result = cardsStore.fetchCards(selectedSite, getCardTypes(selectedSite))
 93‚Üí            val model = result.model
 94‚Üí            val error = result.error
 95‚Üí            when {
 96‚Üí                error != null -> postErrorState()
 97‚Üí                model != null -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 98‚Üí                else -> onRefreshedBackgroundThread()
 99‚Üí            }
100‚Üí        }
101‚Üí    }
102‚Üí
103‚Üí    private fun getCardTypes(selectedSite: SiteModel) = mutableListOf<Type>().apply {
104‚Üí        if (shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.TODAYS_STATS)
105‚Üí        if (shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.PAGES)
106‚Üí        if (dashboardActivityLogCardFeatureUtils.shouldRequestActivityCard(selectedSite)) add(Type.ACTIVITY)
107‚Üí        add(Type.POSTS)
108‚Üí        if (shouldRequestDynamicCards()) add(Type.DYNAMIC)
109‚Üí    }.toList()
110‚Üí
111‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestPagesCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
112‚Üí        return (selectedSite.hasCapabilityEditPages || selectedSite.isSelfHostedAdmin) &&
113‚Üí                !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHidePagesDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
114‚Üí    }
115‚Üí
116‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestStatsCard(selectedSite: SiteModel): Boolean {
117‚Üí        return !appPrefsWrapper.getShouldHideTodaysStatsDashboardCard(selectedSite.siteId)
118‚Üí    }
119‚Üí
120‚Üí    private fun shouldRequestDynamicCards(): Boolean {
121‚Üí        return dynamicDashboardCardsFeatureConfig.isEnabled()
122‚Üí    }
123‚Üí
124‚Üí    private fun MediatorLiveData<CardsUpdate>.postErrorState() {
125‚Üí        val lastStateCards = this.value?.cards
126‚Üí        val showErrorCard = lastStateCards.isNullOrEmpty()
127‚Üí        val showError = lastStateCards?.isNotEmpty() == true
128‚Üí        postState(
129‚Üí            CardsUpdate(
130‚Üí                cards = lastStateCards,
131‚Üí                showErrorCard = showErrorCard,
132‚Üí                showSnackbarError = showError,
133‚Üí                showStaleMessage = showError
134‚Üí            )
135‚Üí        )
136‚Üí    }
137‚Üí}

 37‚Üísealed class PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(
 38‚Üí    internal val parent: ViewGroup,
 39‚Üí    @LayoutRes layout: Int
 40‚Üí) : RecyclerView.ViewHolder(LayoutInflater.from(parent.context).inflate(layout, parent, false)) {
 41‚Üí    abstract fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState)
 42‚Üí
 43‚Üí    class PrepublishingHomeListItemViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 44‚Üí        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_action_list_item) {
 45‚Üí        private val actionType: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_type)
 46‚Üí        private val actionResult: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_result)
 47‚Üí        private val actionLayout: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.action_layout)
 48‚Üí
 49‚Üí        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 50‚Üí            uiState as HomeUiState
 51‚Üí
 52‚Üí            actionType.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.navigationAction.textRes)
 53‚Üí            uiState.actionResult?.let { resultText ->
 54‚Üí                actionResult.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, resultText)
 55‚Üí            }
 56‚Üí
 57‚Üí            actionLayout.isEnabled = uiState.actionClickable
 58‚Üí            actionLayout.setOnClickListener {
 59‚Üí                uiState.onNavigationActionClicked?.invoke(uiState.navigationAction)
 60‚Üí            }
 61‚Üí
 62‚Üí            actionType.setTextColor(
 63‚Üí                ContextCompat.getColor(
 64‚Üí                    itemView.context,
 65‚Üí                    uiState.actionTypeColor
 66‚Üí                )
 67‚Üí            )
 68‚Üí            actionResult.setTextColor(
 69‚Üí                ContextCompat.getColor(
 70‚Üí                    itemView.context,
 71‚Üí                    uiState.actionResultColor
 72‚Üí                )
 73‚Üí            )
 74‚Üí        }
 75‚Üí    }
 76‚Üí
 77‚Üí    class PrepublishingHeaderListItemViewHolder(
 78‚Üí        parentView: ViewGroup,
 79‚Üí        val uiHelpers: UiHelpers,
 80‚Üí        val imageManager: ImageManager
 81‚Üí    ) : PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_home_header_list_item) {
 82‚Üí        private val siteName: TextView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.site_name)
 83‚Üí        private val siteIcon: ImageView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.site_icon)
 84‚Üí
 85‚Üí        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
 86‚Üí            uiState as HeaderUiState
 87‚Üí
 88‚Üí            siteName.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.siteName)
 89‚Üí
 90‚Üí            imageManager.load(siteIcon, ImageType.BLAVATAR, uiState.siteIconUrl)
 91‚Üí        }
 92‚Üí    }
 93‚Üí
 94‚Üí    class PrepublishingSubmitButtonViewHolder(parentView: ViewGroup, val uiHelpers: UiHelpers) :
 95‚Üí        PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(
 96‚Üí            parentView,
 97‚Üí            R.layout.prepublishing_home_publish_button_list_item
 98‚Üí        ) {
 99‚Üí        private val button: Button = itemView.findViewById(R.id.publish_button)
100‚Üí
101‚Üí        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
102‚Üí            uiState as ButtonUiState
103‚Üí
104‚Üí            button.text = uiHelpers.getTextOfUiString(itemView.context, uiState.buttonText)
105‚Üí            button.setOnClickListener {
106‚Üí                uiState.onButtonClicked?.invoke(uiState.publishPost)
107‚Üí            }
108‚Üí        }
109‚Üí    }

111‚Üí    class PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder(
112‚Üí        parentView: ViewGroup,
113‚Üí        val uiHelpers: UiHelpers,
114‚Üí    ) : PrepublishingHomeViewHolder(parentView, R.layout.prepublishing_home_compose_item) {
115‚Üí        private val composeView: ComposeView = itemView.findViewById(R.id.prepublishing_compose_view)
116‚Üí        private val dividerView: View = itemView.findViewById(R.id.bottom_divider)
117‚Üí
118‚Üí        override fun onBind(uiState: PrepublishingHomeItemUiState) {
119‚Üí            require(uiState is SocialUiState) {
120‚Üí                "PrepublishingSocialItemViewHolder can only bind SocialUiState"
121‚Üí            }
122‚Üí
123‚Üí            dividerView.isGone = uiState is SocialUiState.Visible &&
124‚Üí                    uiState.state is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections
125‚Üí
126‚Üí            composeView.setContent {
127‚Üí                val state: SocialUiState by remember(uiState) {
128‚Üí                    mutableStateOf(uiState)
129‚Üí                }
130‚Üí
131‚Üí                AppTheme {
132‚Üí                    (state as? SocialUiState.Visible)?.let { visibleState ->
133‚Üí                        when (val internalState = visibleState.state) {
134‚Üí                            is JetpackSocialUiState.Loaded -> {
135‚Üí                                PostSocialSharingItem(
136‚Üí                                    model = internalState.socialSharingModel,
137‚Üí                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
138‚Üí                                    modifier = Modifier
139‚Üí                                        .fillMaxWidth()
140‚Üí                                        .clickable(
141‚Üí                                            interactionSource = remember { MutableInteractionSource() },
142‚Üí                                            indication = null, // no ripple
143‚Üí                                            onClick = visibleState.onItemClicked,
144‚Üí                                        ),
145‚Üí                                )
146‚Üí                            }
147‚Üí
148‚Üí                            is JetpackSocialUiState.NoConnections -> {
149‚Üí                                PrepublishingHomeSocialNoConnectionsItem(
150‚Üí                                    connectionIconModels = internalState.trainOfIconsModels,
151‚Üí                                    onConnectClick = {
152‚Üí                                        internalState.onConnectProfilesClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING)
153‚Üí                                     },
154‚Üí                                    onDismissClick = { internalState.onNotNowClick(JetpackSocialFlow.PRE_PUBLISHING) },
155‚Üí                                    backgroundColor = MaterialTheme.colors.surface.withBottomSheetElevation(),
156‚Üí                                    modifier = Modifier.fillMaxWidth()
157‚Üí                                )
158‚Üí                            }
159‚Üí
160‚Üí                            JetpackSocialUiState.Loading -> {} // do nothing
161‚Üí                        }
162‚Üí                    }
163‚Üí                }
164‚Üí            }
165‚Üí        }
166‚Üí    }
167‚Üí}
